title: What Scripture Actually Says About the 2 A.M. Scroll (It's Not About Willpower)
caption:
What Scripture actually says about the scroll at 2 a.m. It's not about willpower.

Galatians 6:7-8: whatever a man sows, he reaps. Every scroll at 2 a.m. is a seed, and willpower doesn't fix a field. It just delays the next planting.

The feed doesn't care what it grows in you. Envy, lust, comparison, all sown one swipe at a time, and none of it asked your permission first.

One verse before one notification changes which seed goes in first. You can't out-willpower a field you never plant on purpose. A man who sows to the Spirit in the small, boring hours reaps a life he doesn't have to hide from. That's not a willpower story. That's a harvest.

#faith #galatians #christianmen #manofgod #discipline #phone
